pollIntervalHelp: Too frequent polling may cause HTTP 403 errors from the Grohe API. Recommended: 300s or higher. On errors the interval increases automatically (up to 1h) and resets after a successful poll.
notifyHint:
Select which event categories trigger notifications (via the ioBroker Notification Manager).
Optionally enable one or more direct push providers below (Telegram, Email, etc.) to also receive push messages.
notifyAlertsHelp: Send notifications for critical Grohe alarms (flooding, water shut-off, sensor errors) and high-priority warnings.
notifyControlsHelp: Send notifications when the valve state changes (opened/closed) or when an active control command is triggered.
notifyStatusHelp: Send notifications when a Grohe device goes online or offline.
notifyWarningsHelp: Send notifications for non-critical warnings (battery low, temperature/humidity out of range, WiFi loss, Blue filter/CO₂ low, etc.).
notifyErrorsHelp: Send notifications when the adapter fails to reach the Grohe API (e.g. HTTP 401, 403) and when it recovers.
notifyEnabledHelp: Master switch for all Grohe Smarthome notifications. When enabled, configure which event categories should trigger notifications and optionally select direct push providers (Telegram, Email, etc.).
notifyUserTelegramHelp: Leave empty to send to all users, or enter a specific username.
notifyDevicePushoverHelp: Leave empty to send to all devices.
notifyPhoneHelp: Leave empty to use the default configured in the provider adapter.
notifyChannelSynochatHelp: Name of the channel configured in the synochat adapter.
